subject: Patch OpenDaylight to upgrade to latest pax-logging package
commit_message:
Patch OpenDaylight to upgrade to latest pax-logging package

Patch OpenDaylight to replace the shipped version of pax-logging -
which includes log4j-core v2.14.1 - with the latest version, which
includes log4j-core v2.17.1

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3556
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I3db01bf762f683807d555658610a6a0dade0504a

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-distribution-review-verification-maven-istanbul/32/ )
